name: National Anti-Trafficking Helpline (India)
description: 24x7 helpline that triages trafficking reports and connects survivors with rescue, shelter, and legal aid across India.

name: Anti-Human Trafficking Unit — Delhi Police
description: Specialised police unit that investigates trafficking networks and coordinates rescues in the Delhi region.

name: State Labour Inspectorate — Maharashtra
description: Inspects workplaces for bonded and child labour, wage theft, and unsafe conditions; can raid and shut down offending sites.

name: Childline India Foundation
description: Child protection service responding to reports of children in danger, including child labour and early marriage.

name: Bachpan Bachao Andolan (Save Childhood Movement)
description: NGO conducting rescue operations for children in bonded and hazardous labour and supporting their rehabilitation.

name: West Bengal Anti-Trafficking NGO Network
description: Coalition of NGOs supporting survivors of cross-border trafficking with shelter, counselling, and repatriation help.

name: Cyber Crime & Job-Fraud Cell — Bengaluru
description: Handles fraudulent recruitment, fake overseas job offers, and online scams that lure victims into trafficking.

name: Ministry of External Affairs — Overseas Workers Cell
description: Assists Indian nationals trapped in exploitative jobs abroad, coordinating with embassies for rescue and return.

name: National Human Trafficking Hotline (USA)
description: Confidential 24x7 hotline operated by Polaris that connects victims and witnesses to local services and law enforcement.

name: FBI Field Office — Human Trafficking Program
description: Federal investigators pursuing trafficking networks and coordinating multi-state rescue operations.

name: Department of Labor — Wage and Hour Division
description: Enforces labour law and investigates forced labour, wage theft, and unlawful child employment.

name: Local Child Protective Services (CPS)
description: County child protection responders for minors at risk of labour, marriage, or sexual exploitation.

name: Embassy Consular Assistance Desk
description: Provides emergency documents, repatriation, and protection for nationals trafficked or trapped in another country.

name: Safe Horizon Anti-Trafficking Program
description: Victim-services NGO offering shelter, legal advocacy, and case management for trafficking survivors.

name: Women & Child Development Rescue Cell
description: State women-and-child welfare cell that intervenes in forced marriage and exploitation of women and minors.
